page.content:
In 2003, there are 1,382 Community Health Agents, 160 Health Workers, 41 Laboratory Technicians, 0 Rural Drug Vendors, 0 Military Health Personnel, and 1,176 Community Members. The year 2004 lists 1,446 Community Health Agents, 80 Health Workers, 62 Laboratory Technicians, 37 Rural Drug Vendors, 0 Military Health Personnel, and 689 Community Members, culminating in a total of 4,325 Community Members. 

In Table 2, the regressors include Age (years, n = 96) with an r-value of 0.056 and p-value of 0.59; BMI (kg/m², n = 96) with an r-value of 0.44 and p-value of <0.001; KITT (rate constants, n = 46) with r-values of -0.378 and -0.396 and p-values of 0.0096 and 0.017 respectively; Adiponectin (μg/ml, n = 37) with r-values of -0.375 and -0.334 and p-values of 0.022 and 0.023 respectively; Adipose morphology (delta, n = 96) with r-values of 0.274 and 0.148 and p-values of 0.0068 and 0.13 respectively; Fat cell volume (n = 96) with r-values of 0.456 and 0.396 and p-values of <0.0001 and 0.0041 respectively; and Log HOMA (n = 93) with r-values of 0.497 and 0.369 and p-values of <0.0001 and 0.0042 respectively.
